chimera/chimaera.def: 凱米拉(希神)、幻想、妄想的人物 (單數)
chimera/chimaera.ex: The dream of world peace was considered a political chimera.

chimerical.def: 空想的、荒誕的人的人物
chimerical.ex: He was prone to developing chimerical schemes for getting rich.

chimney.def: 煙囪、火山口、狹窄山縫的人物 (單數)
chimney.col: brick chimney, factory chimney, chimney sweep
chimney.ex: Smoke was rising from the brick chimney of the small cottage.

chimpanzee.ex: The wild chimpanzee is a very intelligent primate species.

chin.def: 下巴、聊天、引體向上、聊天地 (下巴)
chin.col: keep one's chin up (振作), double chin, take it on the chin
chin.ex: He rubbed his chin thoughtfully as he considered the problem.

china.def: 瓷器、陶製品的人物 (單數)
china.ex: She carefully washed the fine china plates after the party.

chinaware.ex: The shop specializes in selling expensive antique chinaware.

chinchilla.def: 南美栗鼠、毛皮的人物 (單數)
chinchilla.ex: The soft chinchilla is native to the high mountain regions.

chine.def: 脊柱、脊肉、切割人物 (單數)
chine.ex: He bought a large piece of pork chine from the butcher shop.

chinese.def: 中國人的、漢語、中文的人物 (中國)
chinese.col: chinese character, chinese new year, mandarin chinese
chinese.ex: She is learning how to write complex Chinese characters.

chink.def: 裂縫、叮噹聲、發出叮噹聲的人物、發聲地 (金)
chink.col: chink in the armor (弱點), chink of light
chink.ex: A thin chink of morning light shone through the heavy curtains.

chinking.def: 發出叮噹聲的、裂縫的人 (或物) (金)
chinking.ex: The chinking sound of coins came from his heavy pocket.

chinless.def: 無下巴的、(口)生性懦弱的人物
chinless.ex: He was dismissed as a chinless wonder by his competitors.

chintz.ex: The bedroom was decorated with bright and colorful chintz.

chintzy.def: 印花棉布的、(口)俗氣的、廉價的人人物 (俗)
chintzy.ex: I find the chintzy furniture in this hotel a bit too much.

chip.def: 瑣碎物、碎片、晶片、洋芋片、鑿下、碎片的人的人物、鑿下地 (碎)
chip.col: computer chip, chip in (插話/捐助), chip off the old block
chip.ex: The computer chip industry is growing very rapidly today.

chipmunk.ex: A striped chipmunk gathered acorns on the forest floor.

chipped.def: 有缺口的、破掉的人的人 (或物) (缺)
chipped.ex: I accidentally dropped the plate and now it's badly chipped.

chipping.def: 鑿、削下、碎屑的人物 (單數)
chipping.ex: The sculptor spent the whole day chipping away at the stone.

chipper.def: 爽朗的、碎料機的人的人人物 (爽)
chipper.ex: He was feeling very chipper after a good night's sleep.

chiromancy/palmistry.ex: Chiromancy is the art of telling a person's future from palms.

chiropodist.ex: The chiropodist treated the patient's painful foot problems.

chiropractic.def: 脊椎按摩療法人物 (單數)
chiropractic.ex: She went to a chiropractic clinic for her back pain today.

chiropractor.ex: The licensed chiropractor helped to realign his spine.

chirp.def: (鳥、蟲)吱吱叫、輕快地說、尖叫的人的人物、叫地 (叫)
chirp.ex: The birds began to chirp happily as the sun rose tonight.

chirpy.def: 愉快的、活潑的人人物 (快)
chirpy.trans: chirp (名詞/動詞/助動詞/形容詞/副詞)
chirpy.ex: She has a very chirpy voice that always cheers me up.

chirrup.def: (鳥)吱吱叫、尖叫的人的人物、叫地 (叫)
chirrup.ex: The constant chirrup of birds filled the morning garden.

chisel.def: 鑿子、刻刀、鑿、雕刻、鑿的人的人物、雕刻地 (鑿)
chisel.ex: He used a sharp chisel to carve the intricate design.

chiseling/chiselling.def: 鑿、雕刻、欺騙的人 (或物) (鑿)
chiseling/chiselling.ex: The art of stone chiseling requires years of patient practice.

chit.def: 欠條、便條、少女的人物 (單數)
chit.ex: He gave the waiter a signed chit for the expensive meal.

chitchat.ex: We spent some time in idle chitchat before starting the meeting.

chivalrous.def: 俠義的、有騎士風度的人物
chivalrous.ex: He is a truly chivalrous man who always helps others in need.

chivalry.def: 騎士制度、騎士精神、俠義的人物 (單數)
chivalry.ex: Stories of the age of chivalry are still very popular today.

chive.ex: I like lots of chopped chives on my baked potato today.

chivvy/chivy.def: 催促、騷擾、哄趕的人的人物、催促地 (催)
chivvy/chivy.ex: The manager had to chivvy the staff along to finish on time.

chlamydia.def: 披衣菌、衣原體感人物 (單數)
chlamydia.ex: Chlamydia is a common infection that can be treated easily.

chlorate.ex: Potassium chlorate is used in making matches and fireworks.

chloric.ex: Chloric acid is a very strong and dangerous chemical compound.

chloride.ex: Sodium chloride is the chemical name for common table salt.

chlorinate.def: 使氯化、用氯處理的人的人物、氯化地 (氯)
chlorinate.ex: The city has to chlorinate the water supply for safety tonight.

chlorination.ex: Water chlorination is essential for preventing local diseases.

chlorine.ex: There was a strong smell of chlorine from the swimming pool.

chlorofluorocarbon.ex: Banning chlorofluorocarbons has helped to protect the ozone.

chloroform.def: 氯仿、麻醉、麻醉的人的人物、麻醉地 (麻)
chloroform.ex: In the past, doctors used chloroform to put patients to sleep.

chlorophyll.ex: Chlorophyll is what gives plants their distinctive green color.

chlorosis.def: (醫)萎黃病、(植)褪綠病人物 (單數)
chlorosis.ex: The lemon tree in the garden is suffering from iron chlorosis.

chock.def: 楔形墊木、楔住、儘可能地的人物、楔住地 (楔)
chock.ex: The small attic was chock-full of old boxes and furniture.

chocolate.def: 巧克力、深褐色、多巧克力的的人物、巧克力地 (巧克力)
chocolate.col: dark chocolate, milk chocolate, chocolate bar, chocolate cake
chocolate.ex: She gave me a large box of Swiss milk chocolates last year.

choice.def: 選擇、抉擇、精選的人物 (選)
choice.col: freedom of choice, make a choice, by choice, first choice
choice.ex: I like this local coffee shop because of its wide choice of teas.
